name: Claws of Anguish
description:
Shred enemies in front of you with your tainted claws, dealing 2178 Disease Damage and an additional 3620 Disease Damage over 20 seconds.

Afflicts enemies with Major Defile for 4 seconds, reducing their healing received and damage shield strength by 12%.

Enemies hit by any part of the ability are afflicted with the Diseased status effect.
